verse_text: But I especially urge you to do this, that I may be restored to you the sooner.

links.context: Here the vision concerns the heavenly altar (v. 46), imaged in the Divine Liturgy, where the saints offer their whole being to God in praise and worship. See [[HEB.13:10]]-19 and notes. The court is the foursquare fullness of the Church, which operates in faith, hope, charity, and good works.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
